home.metaDescription: Manage your school's classes, students, and staff with a modern, all-in-one dashboard.

features.metaDescription: Explore the full feature set — student management, class scheduling, attendance tracking, and more.

hero.heading: Everything your school needs
hero.sub: A complete platform to manage students, classes, staff, and communication — all in one place.

items.title: Student Management
items.desc: Track student profiles, grades, and attendance with ease.

items.title: Class Scheduling
items.desc: Organise classes and timetables across your entire school.

items.title: Announcements
items.desc: Publish school-wide news and alerts instantly.

items.title: Multi-Role Access
items.desc: Separate dashboards for managers and teachers.

items.title: School Profile
items.desc: Showcase your school's mission, history, and contact details.

items.title: Attendance Tracking
items.desc: Record and review daily attendance for every student.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Sign up as a manager or teacher in seconds.

steps.title: Set up your school
steps.desc: Add your school profile, classes, and students.

steps.title: Invite your team
steps.desc: Teachers get instant access to their classes and student lists.

about.metaDescription: Learn about {schoolName}'s mission, history, and how to get in touch.

announcements.metaDescription: Stay up to date with the latest news, events, and announcements from {schoolName}.

login.metaDescription: Log in to your School Dashboard account.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your school dashboard.

register.metaDescription: Create a School Dashboard account as a manager or teacher.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Set up access as a manager or teacher.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: We couldn't load this form. Please try again.

validation.phoneInvalid: Phone must be a valid phone number
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 72 characters
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit

apiErrors.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.
apiErrors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
apiErrors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
apiErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
